Once an account is created, the Hp app is a decent app for managing Hp printers.

author: Shane Soderstrom
content: I've been using this app and a laser jet printer from HP for four years now. The app is difficult to navigate, advertises a lot, and struggles to connect to the printer regularly. Why is the app difficult to navigate? The location of key controls that aren't advertisements move locations every few months. Buttons like 'Print a Document' are usually kept small and get shifted from place to place. They are the only buttons I use!

author: Joe D
content: Worst printing experiences of my life. ONLY way I ever get this thing to print is to unplug it, remove the printer from my devices, plug it back in, install as a new printer AGAIN, and try to print AGAIN. The power button simply does not, has never functioned. Print jobs consistently fail! I LOATHE the HP Smart app. It's my printer inside my home on my network. My wife and I are the only ones that use it, and we have to fight it 90% of the time! Absolutely worst user-unfriendly printer.

author: N
content: The March 24 2026 software / firmware update completely bricked my 3830 printer. After 3 hours with tech support, no one can help me. I had two cases opened during that time - both of which the agent closed without my permission. The chat support doesnt even reply. During the last call I was transferred to a closed department. Not pleased. Im not calling again. Ill be recycling the printer and never returning to HP.
